LanguageData.Childxeva_00.title: Natural Shooter
LanguageData.Childxeva_00.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a military family. From a young age, [PAWN_pronoun] displayed an uncanny talent for marksmanship, hitting targets with precision that stunned [PAWN_possessive] parents. Despite this gift, [PAWN_pronoun] was gentle and empathetic, refusing to harm even the smallest creatures. Raised mostly by [PAWN_possessive] mother, who nurtured [PAWN_possessive] kind nature, [PAWN_nameDef] grew up idolizing [PAWN_possessive] brilliant but overlooked older sister, vowing to protect and support her. A tragic ambush claimed part of [PAWN_possessive] family, leaving [PAWN_nameDef] determined to uncover their fate.
LanguageData.Childxeva_00.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a military family. From a young age, [PAWN_pronoun] displayed an uncanny talent for marksmanship, hitting targets with precision that stunned [PAWN_possessive] parents. Despite this gift, [PAWN_pronoun] was gentle and empathetic, refusing to harm even the smallest creatures. Raised mostly by [PAWN_possessive] mother, who nurtured [PAWN_possessive] kind nature, [PAWN_nameDef] grew up idolizing [PAWN_possessive] brilliant but overlooked older sister, vowing to protect and support her. A tragic ambush claimed part of [PAWN_possessive] family, leaving [PAWN_nameDef] determined to uncover their fate.
LanguageData.Childxeva_01.title: Wandering Orphan
LanguageData.Childxeva_01.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was born in an archaeological team, [PAWN_pronoun] usually likes to secretly dig up the treasures of the ruins behind his parents, in an attack against the archaeological team, [PAWN_nameDef] and his parents were separated. [PAWN_nameDef] was stranded in a lower-class city to survive, and was caught by a welfare officer and put into an orphanage, where [PAWN_nameDef] fought with a group of people to stop a bullying incident and was seriously injured, and was sentenced to military training by a judge after [PAWN_pronoun] recovered.
LanguageData.Childxeva_01.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born in an archaeological team, [PAWN_pronoun] usually likes to secretly dig up the treasures of the ruins behind his parents, in an attack against the archaeological team, [PAWN_nameDef] and his parents were separated. [PAWN_nameDef] was stranded in a lower-class city to survive, and was caught by a welfare officer and put into an orphanage, where [PAWN_nameDef] fought with a group of people to stop a bullying incident and was seriously injured, and was sentenced to military training by a judge after [PAWN_pronoun] recovered.
LanguageData.Childxeva_02.title: Ugly Genius
LanguageData.Childxeva_02.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef]'s genetic defect causes [PAWN_objective] to have a very ugly appearance, but [PAWN_pronoun] is extremely smart and [PAWN_objective] parents plan to send [PAWN_objective] to a city school to study. [PAWN_nameDef] and [PAWN_objective] mother were attacked and captured during their trip. One of the kidnappers took pity on [PAWN_objective] and secretly took [PAWN_objective] to an orphanage, but soon afterwards [PAWN_nameDef] was sold by the orphanage to a laboratory, where [PAWN_nameDef] experienced a life of hell. In the end, [PAWN_nameDef] came into contact with an unknown substance that reorganized and strengthened every cell in [PAWN_objective] body, thus restoring [PAWN_objective] original appearance, but [PAWN_pronoun] also lost all [PAWN_objective] skills and memories.
LanguageData.Childxeva_02.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s genetic defect causes [PAWN_objective] to have a very ugly appearance, but [PAWN_pronoun] is extremely smart and [PAWN_objective] parents plan to send [PAWN_objective] to a city school to study. [PAWN_nameDef] and [PAWN_objective] mother were attacked and captured during their trip. One of the kidnappers took pity on [PAWN_objective] and secretly took [PAWN_objective] to an orphanage, but soon afterwards [PAWN_nameDef] was sold by the orphanage to a laboratory, where [PAWN_nameDef] experienced a life of hell. In the end, [PAWN_nameDef] came into contact with an unknown substance that reorganized and strengthened every cell in [PAWN_objective] body, thus restoring [PAWN_objective] original appearance, but [PAWN_pronoun] also lost all [PAWN_objective] skills and memories.
LanguageData.Childxeva_03.title: Eager Learner
LanguageData.Childxeva_03.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a family of craftsmen, and [PAWN_pronoun] has always been sharp-minded, with a fondness for studying technology. Sometimes, [PAWN_pronoun] could spend an entire month holed up at home without stepping outside. Although [PAWN_nameDef]'s behavior is unconventional, [PAWN_pronoun] is passionate about helping others, and the townspeople are very fond of [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.Childxeva_03.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a family of craftsmen, and [PAWN_pronoun] has always been sharp-minded, with a fondness for studying technology. Sometimes, [PAWN_pronoun] could spend an entire month holed up at home without stepping outside. Although [PAWN_nameDef]'s behavior is unconventional, [PAWN_pronoun] is passionate about helping others, and the townspeople are very fond of [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.Childxeva_04.title: Chuunibyou Boy
LanguageData.Childxeva_04.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a commoner family in the kingdom, and [PAWN_pronoun] has loved swordplay from a young age, dreaming of one day becoming a legendary dragon slayer to protect [PAWN_possessive] homeland. During a brutal bandit attack, [PAWN_nameDef] was nearly annihilated while defending the town, but [PAWN_nameDef]'s father refused to give up on [PAWN_objective], merging [PAWN_pronoun]'s remaining half-brain with a laboratory AI, thus transforming [PAWN_nameDef] into a servant AI.
LanguageData.Childxeva_04.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a commoner family in the kingdom, and [PAWN_pronoun] has loved swordplay from a young age, dreaming of one day becoming a legendary dragon slayer to protect [PAWN_possessive] homeland. During a brutal bandit attack, [PAWN_nameDef] was nearly annihilated while defending the town, but [PAWN_nameDef]'s father refused to give up on [PAWN_objective], merging [PAWN_pronoun]'s remaining half-brain with a laboratory AI, thus transforming [PAWN_nameDef] into a servant AI.
LanguageData.Childxeva_SE.title: Prototype of Project TwinStar
LanguageData.Childxeva_SE.baseDesc: A woman who participated in the Project TwinStar gave birth to [PAWN_nameDef], [PAWN_nameDef] was sent to the organization after birth to receive ideological education and combat training. Because he grew up in an environment with restricted information, [PAWN_nameDef]'s values were unusually distorted. [PAWN_pronoun] had only one wish, to grow up quickly and serve his country.
LanguageData.Childxeva_SE.description: A woman who participated in the Project TwinStar gave birth to [PAWN_nameDef], [PAWN_nameDef] was sent to the organization after birth to receive ideological education and combat training. Because he grew up in an environment with restricted information, [PAWN_nameDef]'s values were unusually distorted. [PAWN_pronoun] had only one wish, to grow up quickly and serve his country.
